caption:
Where to buy the Hello Kitty Shinkansen Bento Box in Japan? ⬇️

It’s available at one of the stores right inside Osaka Station before heading to the platform🎀

How to ride the Hello Kitty Shinkansen🚄⬇️ (Last day is on May 17, 2026)

1.This train has specific numbers and a timetable. It runs between Osaka and Hakata🏙️

2.From Osaka → Hakata, get Kodama 849 ticket🎫 From Hakata → Osaka, buy Kodama 842 🎫 (You can also travel to stations in between, e.g. Osaka → Kobe)

3. Buy tickets online in advance💻 I used Klook.com (link saved in bio). The code TRAVELOFFER gives 10% off & works for other experiences in Japan too (Make sure to buy tickets only for Kodama 849 or Kodama 842 @klooktravel 

4.Double-check the timetable here 🕒: www.jrailpass.com/blog/hello-kitty-shinkansen

The first 2 cars were fully decorated when I went and cars 3-8 not as fully transformed still feature Hello Kitty details🎀✨

🗺️🎁When exploring Japan you can get 10% off on experiences on Klook.com with the code TRAVELOFFER 

#HelloKittyShinkansen #JapanTravel #Shinkansen #HelloKitty #TravelInJapan
